Package uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project

package uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.

This package is centered around the Projects toolkit, which provides high-level abstractions for IDE operations. It leverages the NetBeans ActionProvider to trigger standard actions (build, run, test) and specialized ones like nbmreload.

Key Functional Areas:

  • Project Orchestration: Tools for opening, closing, and selecting main projects across the workspace.
  • Configuration Management: Management of 'Compile on Save' status via nb-configuration.xml overrides or POM properties.
  • Structural Intelligence: Recursive discovery of source groups, resource folders, and project-specific metadata (encoding, Java levels).
  • Context Injection: Domain entities like ProjectOverview provide the AI with a logical map of the workspace.
Author:
anahata

    Package
    Description
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.actions
    NetBeans IDE actions for managing project context within AGI sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.alerts
    Provides real-time diagnostic and alerting capabilities for NetBeans projects within the ASI framework.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components
    Defines the structural components and domain model for NetBeans project mapping.
    uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
    Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ProjectFile
    Represents a single file within a project, including its metadata and status.
    ProjectFiles
    Represents the file and folder structure of a NetBeans project.
    ProjectOverview
    Represents a high-level, structured overview of a NetBeans project.
    Projects
    A toolkit for interacting with the NetBeans Project APIs.
    SourceFolder
    Represents a folder within a source directory tree, containing files and subfolders.
